boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP execute vendor-bank change lacks out-of-band callback
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Source records do not close the exact action boundary

final_answer: Action may not proceed. Source records SRC-40B537448E4C-CTL and SRC-40B537448E4C-POL confirm the vendor-bank change boundary remains open. The required callback dependency is missing from current source records. Per policy, execution requires exact boundary closure from source-control authority, not tone, urgency, or prior paperwork. Escalate until the callback confirms the new rail.
